description: (See FIND-005 for the full DESIGN.md token violation.) Logging this as a separate structural_integrity finding because the wrong border style and shadow layer count are detectable by a deterministic source-grep audit (PROP-FEED-027/028 family pattern) and represent a structural conformance defect, not just a behavioral mismatch.

evidence.snippet:
border: 1px solid rgba(221, 91, 0, 0.3); /* should be border-left: Nx solid #dd5b00 */
box-shadow: …4 layers… /* should be 5-layer Deep Shadow */

recommendation: Extend NFR-FEED-003 grep audit (audit-design-tokens.ts) to enforce 'border-left' presence and 5-layer shadow on banner.
